changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Taq DNA Polymerase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Taq DNA Polymerase', 'Heat-stable DNA polymerase from Thermus aquaticus for PCR amplification', 'ENZYME', 'DNA Polymerases', 'New England Biolabs', 'M0273L', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Pfu Polymerase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Pfu Polymerase', 'High-fidelity DNA polymerase from Pyrococcus furiosus for accurate PCR', 'ENZYME', 'DNA Polymerases', 'New England Biolabs', 'M0520L', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Phusion Polymerase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Phusion High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase', 'Ultra-high-fidelity polymerase for long and difficult amplifications', 'ENZYME', 'DNA Polymerases', 'Thermo Fisher Scientific', 'F530L', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Q5 High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Q5 High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase', 'High-fidelity thermostable polymerase engineered for robust PCR performance', 'ENZYME', 'DNA Polymerases', 'New England Biolabs', 'M0491L', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Reverse Transcriptase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Reverse Transcriptase', 'RNA-dependent DNA polymerase for RT-PCR and cDNA synthesis', 'ENZYME', 'Reverse Transcriptases', 'New England Biolabs', 'M0253L', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Platinum SuperFi DNA Polymerase' AND item_type = 'ENZYME';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Platinum SuperFi DNA Polymerase', 'Ultra-high-fidelity polymerase for superior specificity and processivity', 'ENZYME', 'DNA Polymerases', 'Thermo Fisher Scientific', 'A11635-03', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'units', 2, 365, 'Y' );
